artPrompt: A widescreen film-still of a goblin shaman caught mid-coin-flip in a rioting town square at night, a spinning coin frozen in the air casting twin glints across his torn, wavering expression, his body half-bulging with power and half-shrinking in indecision; bonfire embers and confetti swirl around him, overturned boxes behind in flame orange against night-black smoke, eternal undecision, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Swing Precinct Shaman
text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, flip a coin. If you win the flip, put a +1/+1 counter on Swing Precinct Shaman. If you lose the flip, remove one. It can never decide.
{R}: Reroll your most recent coin flip. Activate only once each turn.
flavorText: Undecided until the very moment it stops mattering.
